tutorialTopics.title: Onboarding & Sign Up
tutorialTopics.description: Get started with EfficientTutor by setting up your account correctly.
tutorialTopics.icon: <svg class="w-6 h-6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M18 9v3m0 0v3m0-3h3m-3 0h-3m-2-5a4 4 0 11-8 0 4 4 0 018 0zM3 20a6 6 0 0112 0v1H3v-1z"></path></svg>

tutorials.title: Teacher Sign Up
tutorials.description: Step-by-step guide for educators to create their professional profile.
steps: Visit the signup page and select "I am a Teacher".
Fill in your professional details and subjects taught.
Verify your email address via the link sent to you.
Complete your profile by adding your availability.

tutorials.title: Parent Sign Up
tutorials.description: How parents can create accounts to monitor their children's progress.
steps: Select "I am a Parent" on the registration screen.
Enter your details and set a secure password.
Link your account to your child using their unique Student ID.
Configure notification preferences for lesson updates.

tutorials.title: Creating a Student Profile
tutorials.description: Setting up individual student records for personalized tracking.
steps: From the Teacher Dashboard, go to "Manage Students".
Click "Create New Student Profile".
Input the student's basic information and learning goals.
Save the profile to generate a unique ID for parent linking.

tutorialTopics.title: Enrollment Management
tutorialTopics.description: Master the tools for managing student placements and group dynamics.

tutorials.title: Creating Enrollments
tutorials.description: Learn how to enroll students into specific courses or time slots.
steps: Navigate to the "Enrollment" tab.
Select the student and the target course.
Choose the start date and recurring schedule.
Click "Confirm Enrollment" to finalize the booking.

tutorials.title: Editing Enrollments
tutorials.description: Modify existing student schedules and course details.
steps: Find the active enrollment in the student's profile.
Click "Edit Schedule" to change dates or times.
Review any pricing adjustments if course hours changed.
Save changes to notify the parent automatically.

tutorials.title: Group Management
tutorials.description: Add or remove students from study groups and classes.
steps: Go to "Groups" in the main navigation.
Select a group to see current members.
Use the "Add Member" button to search and include new students.
Use the "Remove" icon next to a student name to unenroll them from the group.
tutorials.troubleshoot: Students can only be removed from a group if they have no pending invoices for that specific class.

tutorialTopics.title: Zoom App Integration
tutorialTopics.description: Automate your virtual classrooms by linking Zoom directly to your timetable.
tutorialTopics.icon: <svg class="w-6 h-6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M15 10l4.553-2.276A1 1 0 0121 8.618v6.764a1 1 0 01-1.447.894L15 14M5 18h8a2 2 0 002-2V8a2 2 0 00-2-2H5a2 2 0 00-2 2v8a2 2 0 002 2z"></path></svg>

tutorials.title: Getting Started with Zoom
tutorials.description: An introduction to how EfficientTutor automates your virtual classrooms using Zoom.
steps: Understand the benefit: Zero manual link sharing with students.
See how links auto-sync when you move a class in your timetable.
Learn about the "One-Button Sync" for your entire schedule.
Prepare your Zoom account for the initial connection.

tutorials.title: Connecting Zoom Account
tutorials.description: Link your Zoom account to start generating automated meeting links for all tuitions.
steps: Log in to your EfficientTutor dashboard.
(if on mobile, click on the `3 dashes` More button). Then, Navigate to Profile Section.
Find the Zoom App card and click the "Connect" button.
If you are not signed-in, prompted to sign-in using you own Zoom account.
Authorize EfficientTutor to access your Zoom meetings when prompted by the Zoom OAuth screen.
You will be automatically re-directed back to IOS/android app or website you came from with a success toast!
tutorials.troubleshoot:
- If you aren't signed in, please don't take more than 10minutes in signing else try again.
- Please make sure to tick the box when prompted to authorize 'EfficientTutor' to access your account

tutorials.title: Disconnecting Zoom
tutorials.description: Safely remove the EfficientTutor integration and stop automated link generation.
steps: Log in to your EfficientTutor dashboard.
(if on mobile, click on the `3 dashes` More button). Then, Navigate to Profile Section.
Find the Zoom App card and click the "Disconnect" button.
tutorials.troubleshoot: - Please note you won't be able to sync meetings or manage them automatically with one button if you decide to disconnect!

tutorials.title: Bulk Syncing Meeting Links
tutorials.description: Update or generate Zoom links for your entire timetable with a single click.
steps: Log in to your EfficientTutor dashboard.
(if on mobile, click on the `3 dashes` More button). Then, Navigate to 'Tuitions' Section.
At the very Top, Click on the 'Sync Meetings' button
Feel free to use the app anyway you want while the background process finishes, you will get a 'Success' Prompt when everything is set and done!
tutorials.troubleshoot:
- The Sync Meetings button will NOT work if you haven't executed the 'Connect Zoom' Tutorial step beforehand!
- Please note that manual zoom meet edits will be over-written by whatever settings in the efficient tutor account. Please treat the efficient tutor timetable/tuition settings as the only source of truth, everything will be automatically synced!

tutorials.title: Resetting All Meeting Links
tutorials.description: The "Nuke" option: Clear all auto-generated Zoom links to perform a fresh synchronization.
steps: Log in to your EfficientTutor dashboard.
(if on mobile, click on the `3 dashes` More button). Then, Navigate to 'Tuitions' Section.
At the very Top, Click on the 'Nuke All Meetings' button.
Feel free to use the app anyway you want while the background process finishes, you will get a 'Success' Prompt when everything is set and done!
tutorials.troubleshoot: Caution: This action is irreversible. Use this only if you want to completely re-sync your timetable or if you have changed your primary Zoom account.
